name: Offline/PWA Robust Cache Fix
fixes: service worker no longer fails install when one file/CDN is unavailable
index.html works offline even if Supabase CDN script is not loaded
navigation falls back to cached index.html
same-origin files use network-first with cache fallback
note: Users must open the app once online after deploying v20 so the new service worker can install and cache the app shell.
